differential_diagnoses: Legionellosis (Legionnaires' disease) with severe rhabdomyolysis and AKI
Antisynthetase syndrome presenting as acute interstitial lung disease and myositis
next_steps: Serial monitoring of electrolytes, CK, and myoglobin levels
Expanded infectious disease workup including Leptospira serology, blood cultures, and atypical respiratory pathogen testing
Comprehensive autoimmune panel (ANA, anti-Jo-1, anti-SRP) to evaluate for inflammatory myopathy
Direct questioning of patient and family regarding specific brand and potential contamination of herbal supplements
Environmental investigation of the patient's residence for stagnant water or HVAC sources of Legionella
